nasb.text: “When I broke the seven for the four thousand, how many large baskets full of broken pieces did you pick up?” And they *said to Him, “Seven.”

esv.text: “And the seven for the four thousand, how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up?” And they said to him, “Seven.”

cnv.text: “那七個餅分給四千人吃，你們收拾的零碎裝滿了幾個大籃子呢？”他們說：“七個。”

ccb.text: 耶稣又说：“我用七个饼喂饱四千人的时候，你们捡了多少筐零碎呢？” 门徒答道：“七筐。”

csbs.text: “那七个饼给四千人的时候，你们收拾的碎块装满了几个筐子呢？” 门徒们回答说：“七个。”
